blended.narrative: Red Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,811 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
